summary.para: The value for that series will not be used to update the model. Unless you also specify skip_result, the results will be created as usual. This action is suitable when certain values are expected to be consistently anomalous and they affect the model in a way that negatively impacts the rest of the results.
The result will not be created. Unless you also specify skip_model_update, the model will be updated as usual with the corresponding series value.
